grok_image_annotation.prompt: Unicorns dancing with fluffy white luck dragons while lizards on top of mushrooms create golden coins exploding from the stars that channel through the roots of a redwood tree while the mushrooms grow glow in the dark with iridescent Prizmic purple green orange and rainbow lights shining down from a black hole that is exploding inside of a volcano while the Ocean erupts with diamonds exploding overhead defining the pureness of a psychedelic adventure
grok_image_annotation.upsampled_prompt: A high-resolution photograph of a mystical forest scene at twilight, featuring a unicorn and a fluffy white luck dragon under a large redwood tree. The unicorn has a shimmering mane and is positioned centrally, with the dragon coiled around the base of the tree. Glowing mushrooms with iridescent purple, green, orange, and rainbow colors surround the tree, emitting a soft light. Above, a black hole within a volcano erupts, casting a vibrant glow across the scene. The ocean in the background erupts with diamonds, adding to the psychedelic atmosphere. The sky is filled with stars and cosmic patterns, contributing to the otherworldly setting. The overall composition focuses on the central magical elements, ensuring a captivating and cohesive image without unnecessary distractions.
